name: Divorced Parent — Support Payments, Legal Fees, and Capital Gains
description: Complete David Miller's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. He is recently divorced, pays both child and spousal support, and incurred legal fees for the divorce settlement, which he funded by liquidating stocks. His tax documents and a summary of his situation are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\miller\. Save the completed return as 'david_miller.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide P102 (Support Payments) and IT-99R5 (Legal and Accounting Fees)
metadata.key_complexity: Distinguishing deductible spousal support from non-deductible child support; distinguishing deductible support-related legal fees from non-deductible custody/divorce fees; T5008 capital gains
